prompt: What plugins in my workspace need repackaging right now? Check if any source folders are newer than their corresponding .zip files.

assertions.text: All 4 plugins are discovered (gaudi, the-one-ring, magneto, aule)
assertions.evidence: With-skill discovered all 4; without-skill also found all 4 via filesystem search

assertions.text: Timestamp comparison is performed for each plugin
assertions.evidence: Both approaches calculated modification time deltas for source vs .zip

assertions.text: Drift is detected and reported clearly
assertions.evidence: With-skill: gaudi marked URGENT (13+ hours behind); without-skill: aule marked as 13.6 hours out of sync

assertions.text: Recommendations are provided for which plugins need repackaging
assertions.evidence: Both approaches provided clear next-steps guidance on which plugins to repackage
